terminals.title: [1] CARLA Server
terminals.command: cd '__CARLA_DIR__'; export DISPLAY="${DISPLAY:-:0}"; echo 'CARLA Server starting on port __CARLA_PORT__ on DISPLAY='"$DISPLAY"; ./CarlaUE4.sh -carla-rpc-port=__CARLA_PORT__ -quality-level=Low

terminals.title: [3] Manual CAV Driver
terminals.command: sleep 10; echo 'Starting Manual CAV Driver'; . /opt/ros/*/setup.bash 2>/dev/null || true; cd '__PARENT_DIR__/launch/examples/carla_examples'; export DISPLAY="${DISPLAY:-:0}"; export SDL_VIDEODRIVER="x11"; export SDL_AUDIODRIVER="dummy"; export PYTHONPATH="${PYTHONPATH:-}:__PARENT_DIR__/launch/python_packages:__CARLA_DIR__/PythonAPI/carla"; export CARLA_VEHICLE_TYPE='__CARLA_VEHICLE_TYPE__'; __PYTHON_BIN__ carla_av_ros2.py 2>&1 | tee '__PARENT_DIR__/manual_cav.log'

terminals.title: [4] Sensor Publisher
terminals.command: sleep 12; echo 'Starting Sensor Publisher'; . /opt/ros/*/setup.bash 2>/dev/null || true; cd '__PARENT_DIR__/launch/examples/carla_examples'; export PYTHONPATH="${PYTHONPATH:-}:__PARENT_DIR__/launch/python_packages:__CARLA_DIR__/PythonAPI/carla"; __PYTHON_BIN__ carla_sensor_ros2.py 2>&1 | tee '__PARENT_DIR__/sensor_publisher.log'

terminals.title: [5] TeraSim Co-simulation
terminals.command: sleep 20; echo 'Starting TeraSim Co-simulation'; . /opt/ros/*/setup.bash 2>/dev/null || true; export TERASIM_SCENARIO='__TERASIM_SCENARIO__'; bash '__PARENT_DIR__/launch/run/terminal5_cosim_runner.sh'

terminals.title: [6] GNSS Decoder
terminals.command: sleep 15; echo 'Starting GNSS Decoder'; . /opt/ros/*/setup.bash 2>/dev/null || true; cd '__PARENT_DIR__/launch/examples/carla_examples'; export PYTHONPATH="${PYTHONPATH:-}:__PARENT_DIR__/launch/python_packages:__CARLA_DIR__/PythonAPI/carla"; __PYTHON_BIN__ gnss_decoder_fallback.py 2>&1 | tee '__PARENT_DIR__/gnss_decoder.log'

terminals.title: [7] Autoware Planning
terminals.command: sleep 17; echo 'Starting Autoware Planning Bridge'; . /opt/ros/*/setup.bash 2>/dev/null || true; cd '__PARENT_DIR__/launch/examples/carla_examples'; export PYTHONPATH="${PYTHONPATH:-}:__PARENT_DIR__/launch/python_packages:__CARLA_DIR__/PythonAPI/carla"; __PYTHON_BIN__ planning_simulator_fallback.py 2>&1 | tee '__PARENT_DIR__/autoware_launch.log'

terminals.title: [8] Preview Control
terminals.command: sleep 20; echo 'Starting Preview Control'; . /opt/ros/*/setup.bash 2>/dev/null || true; bash '__PARENT_DIR__/launch/run/terminal8_preview_runner.sh'

terminals.title: [9] TeraSim Scenario
terminals.command: sleep 22; echo 'Starting TeraSim Scenario: __TERASIM_SCENARIO__'; . /opt/ros/*/setup.bash 2>/dev/null || true; export TERASIM_SCENARIO='__TERASIM_SCENARIO__'; bash '__PARENT_DIR__/launch/run/terminal9_scenario_runner.sh'

terminals.title: [10] RViz2
terminals.command: sleep 25; echo 'Starting RViz2'; . /opt/ros/*/setup.bash 2>/dev/null || true; rviz2 -d '__SCRIPT_DIR__/../rviz_config/carla_mcity_ros2.rviz' 2>&1 | tee '__PARENT_DIR__/rviz2.log'
